case_title: ALEXANDER V. CHOULOS VS. HEREMBAG, LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,651.05 FILED BY CHOULOS, ALEXANDER V. AS TO DEFENDANT HEREMBAG, LLC (AGENT OF CORP: GABRIEL JACK) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER V. CHOULOS IS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT HEREMBAG, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. RIFAT OMER A FORMER EMPLOYEE APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: 0.00 SERVED DEC-10-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HEREMBAG, LLC (AGENT OF CORP: GABRIEL JACK)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOULOS, ALEXANDER V. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEREMBAG, LLC (AGENT OF CORP: GABRIEL JACK) $7,651.05 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,726.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
